faqs.answer: Pest emergencies include large rodent infestations, bee or wasp nests in living areas, bed bug outbreaks, multiple cockroach sightings indicating severe infestation, or any pest situation posing immediate health or safety risks. We respond 24/7 to these urgent situations throughout Kingsbridge.
